'''Vensell''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Vensell was present on board the [[Valiant (starship)|''Valiant'']], and he commanded a force of ships including the [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class medium cruiser]] ''[[Shador (Strike-class)|Shador]]'' that departed the planet [[Jerijador]].
